# Infernux Agent Documentation Index

Index-Schema: 1
Documented-Release: 0.2.1
Release-Status: preview
Last-Verified: 2026-07-15
Curated-Document-Count: 40
Localized-API-Symbol-Count: 158
Guidance-Linked-API-Count: 36
Learning-Path-Count: 1
Index-Content-SHA256: 1bf12f505734668d08cefbed80e45f855d241d5a0a85a33bf4ffbf15ff7cf680
Canonical-Site: https://infernux-engine.com
Repository: https://github.com/ChenlizheMe/Infernux
License: MIT

This compact file is generated from the documentation manifest and machine indexes. Use llms-full.txt only when complete curated bodies are needed.

--- BEGIN INDEX ---

## Start here

- [Documentation home](https://infernux-engine.com/wiki/site/index.html): human and Agent entry point for Learn, Manual, Architecture, and API content.
- Learning path `first-flight`: First Flight / 首次点火 · 25-40 minutes.
  - 1. [Open, save, and run](https://infernux-engine.com/wiki/site/en/learn/getting-started.html) / [打开、保存并运行](https://infernux-engine.com/wiki/site/zh/learn/getting-started.html): The editor enters and exits Play mode with a saved visible scene and no repeating Console error.
  - 2. [Add gameplay behavior](https://infernux-engine.com/wiki/site/en/learn/first-component.html) / [加入玩法逻辑](https://infernux-engine.com/wiki/site/zh/learn/first-component.html): SpinComponent rotates its GameObject, exposes Speed in the Inspector, and logs start once.
  - 3. [Build and verify](https://infernux-engine.com/wiki/site/en/learn/build-and-share.html) / [构建并验证](https://infernux-engine.com/wiki/site/zh/learn/build-and-share.html): A freshly extracted Windows package launches the correct scene without depending on the editor.

## Canonical curated documentation

Every Learn, Manual, and Architecture entry below comes from docs-index.json. Status and verification dates are evidence, not decoration.

### Learn

#### en
- [Getting Started](https://infernux-engine.com/wiki/site/en/learn/getting-started.html) — Install an Infernux preview, create or open a project, identify the main editor panels, save a scene, and enter Play mode. · status=preview; since=0.2.1; last_verified=2026-07-15
- [Your First Component](https://infernux-engine.com/wiki/site/en/learn/first-component.html) — Create an InxComponent Python script, expose a serialized speed field, attach it to a GameObject, and verify lifecycle behavior in Play mode. · status=preview; since=0.2.1; last_verified=2026-07-15
- [Build and Share a Project](https://infernux-engine.com/wiki/site/en/learn/build-and-share.html) — Add saved scenes to Build Settings, configure a Windows standalone player, build it, and verify the result outside the editor. · status=preview; since=0.2.1; last_verified=2026-07-15
- [2D Foundations](https://infernux-engine.com/wiki/site/en/learn/2d-foundations.html) — Build a minimal 2D scene with an orthographic Camera, SpriteRenderer, imported texture, predictable world scale, and a frame-rate-independent movement check. · status=preview; since=0.2.1; last_verified=2026-07-15
- [3D Foundations](https://infernux-engine.com/wiki/site/en/learn/3d-foundations.html) — Build and validate a minimal lit 3D scene using a perspective Camera, MeshRenderer, material, Light, shadows, and RenderStack. · status=preview; since=0.2.1; last_verified=2026-07-15
- [Animation Workflow](https://infernux-engine.com/wiki/site/en/learn/animation-workflow.html) — Create 2D or 3D animation clips, place them in an .animfsm controller, attach SpiritAnimator or SkeletalAnimator, and verify state, transition, event, and playback behavior. · status=preview; since=0.2.1; last_verified=2026-07-15
- [Audio Workflow](https://infernux-engine.com/wiki/site/en/learn/audio-workflow.html) — Import a WAV clip, configure one AudioListener and a multi-track AudioSource, test looping and one-shot playback, and diagnose lifetime or spatial attenuation issues. · status=preview; since=0.2.1; last_verified=2026-07-15

#### zh-CN
- [快速开始](https://infernux-engine.com/wiki/site/zh/learn/getting-started.html) — 安装 Infernux 预览版，创建或打开项目，理解主要编辑器面板，保存场景并进入 Play 模式。 · status=preview; since=0.2.1; last_verified=2026-07-15
- [第一个组件](https://infernux-engine.com/wiki/site/zh/learn/first-component.html) — 创建 InxComponent Python 脚本，暴露可序列化速度字段，把它挂到 GameObject，并在 Play 模式验证生命周期。 · status=preview; since=0.2.1; last_verified=2026-07-15
- [构建并分享项目](https://infernux-engine.com/wiki/site/zh/learn/build-and-share.html) — 把已保存场景加入 Build Settings，配置 Windows 独立播放器，执行构建，并在编辑器之外验证产物。 · status=preview; since=0.2.1; last_verified=2026-07-15
- [2D 基础](https://infernux-engine.com/wiki/site/zh/learn/2d-foundations.html) — 使用正交 Camera、SpriteRenderer、导入纹理、明确世界尺度和帧率无关移动检查构建最小 2D 场景。 · status=preview; since=0.2.1; last_verified=2026-07-15
- [3D 基础](https://infernux-engine.com/wiki/site/zh/learn/3d-foundations.html) — 使用透视 Camera、MeshRenderer、材质、Light、阴影与 RenderStack 构建并验证最小受光 3D 场景。 · status=preview; since=0.2.1; last_verified=2026-07-15
- [动画工作流](https://infernux-engine.com/wiki/site/zh/learn/animation-workflow.html) — 创建 2D 或 3D 动画 Clip，放入 .animfsm 控制器，挂载 SpiritAnimator 或 SkeletalAnimator，并验证状态、过渡、事件与播放行为。 · status=preview; since=0.2.1; last_verified=2026-07-15
- [音频工作流](https://infernux-engine.com/wiki/site/zh/learn/audio-workflow.html) — 导入 WAV，配置一个 AudioListener 和多轨 AudioSource，测试循环与 One-shot 播放，并排查生命周期或空间衰减问题。 · status=preview; since=0.2.1; last_verified=2026-07-15

### Manual

#### en
- [API Versioning and Compatibility](https://infernux-engine.com/wiki/site/en/manual/api-versioning.html) — Explain API snapshot immutability, machine-readable version comparisons, current 0.2.1 baseline limits, and how to interpret added, removed, or changed symbols. · status=preview; since=0.2.1; last_verified=2026-07-15
- [Assets and `.meta` files](https://infernux-engine.com/wiki/site/en/manual/assets-and-meta.html) — Explain project assets, GUID and path identity, .meta sidecars, typed references, import settings, safe move/delete operations, caching, and runtime loading. · status=preview; since=0.2.1; last_verified=2026-07-15
- [Debugging and the Console](https://infernux-engine.com/wiki/site/en/manual/debugging.html) — A repeatable Infernux debugging workflow using the Console, Debug logging, lifecycle checks, minimal reproduction, and evidence suitable for GitHub Issues. · status=preview; since=0.2.1; last_verified=2026-07-15
- [Engine Map](https://infernux-engine.com/wiki/site/en/manual/engine-map.html) — A routing map from common Infernux development tasks to the responsible engine systems and canonical API pages. · status=preview; since=0.2.1; last_verified=2026-07-15
- [Input and Time](https://infernux-engine.com/wiki/site/en/manual/input-and-time.html) — Explain held/down/up input semantics, game-view focus, mouse coordinates, delta time, fixed time, unscaled time, and frame-independent movement. · status=preview; since=0.2.1; last_verified=2026-07-15
- [Physics](https://infernux-engine.com/wiki/site/en/manual/physics.html) — Explain Rigidbody and Collider roles, dynamic versus kinematic movement, fixed-step forces, collision/trigger callbacks, layers, and physics queries. · status=preview; since=0.2.1; last_verified=2026-07-15
- [Rendering and RenderStack](https://infernux-engine.com/wiki/site/en/manual/rendering-and-renderstack.html) — Explain the scene RenderStack singleton, forward/deferred pipelines, injection points, pass ordering, graph invalidation, post-processing effects, and safe extension boundaries. · status=preview; since=0.2.1; last_verified=2026-07-15
- [Scenes and Objects](https://infernux-engine.com/wiki/site/en/manual/scenes-and-objects.html) — Explain Infernux scene ownership, GameObject identity, Transform hierarchy, component lookup, activation, and build-index scene loading. · status=preview; since=0.2.1; last_verified=2026-07-15
- [Screen-space UI](https://infernux-engine.com/wiki/site/en/manual/ui.html) — Explain the screen-space UI hierarchy, Canvas scaling, anchors, text and image layout, button events, hit testing, and current transition limitations. · status=preview; since=0.2.1; last_verified=2026-07-15

#### zh-CN
- [API 版本与兼容性](https://infernux-engine.com/wiki/site/zh/manual/api-versioning.html) — 解释 API 快照不可变性、机器可读版本比较、当前 0.2.1 基线限制，以及如何理解新增、移除或改变的符号。 · status=preview; since=0.2.1; last_verified=2026-07-15
- [资源与 `.meta` 文件](https://infernux-engine.com/wiki/site/zh/manual/assets-and-meta.html) — 解释项目资源、GUID 与路径身份、.meta 边车文件、类型化引用、导入设置、安全移动/删除、缓存和运行时加载。 · status=preview; since=0.2.1; last_verified=2026-07-15
- [调试与 Console](https://infernux-engine.com/wiki/site/zh/manual/debugging.html) — 使用 Console、Debug 日志、生命周期检查、最小复现与 GitHub Issue 证据进行可重复的 Infernux 调试。 · status=preview; since=0.2.1; last_verified=2026-07-15
- [引擎地图](https://infernux-engine.com/wiki/site/zh/manual/engine-map.html) — 把常见 Infernux 开发任务映射到对应引擎系统与权威 API 页的路由地图。 · status=preview; since=0.2.1; last_verified=2026-07-15
- [输入与时间](https://infernux-engine.com/wiki/site/zh/manual/input-and-time.html) — 解释 held/down/up 输入语义、Game 视图焦点、鼠标坐标、帧时间、固定时间、非缩放时间与帧率无关移动。 · status=preview; since=0.2.1; last_verified=2026-07-15
- [物理](https://infernux-engine.com/wiki/site/zh/manual/physics.html) — 解释 Rigidbody 与 Collider 职责、动态和运动学移动、固定步力、碰撞/触发回调、层与物理查询。 · status=preview; since=0.2.1; last_verified=2026-07-15
- [渲染与 RenderStack](https://infernux-engine.com/wiki/site/zh/manual/rendering-and-renderstack.html) — 解释场景 RenderStack 单例、前向/延迟管线、注入点、Pass 顺序、Graph 失效、后处理效果与安全扩展边界。 · status=preview; since=0.2.1; last_verified=2026-07-15
- [场景与对象](https://infernux-engine.com/wiki/site/zh/manual/scenes-and-objects.html) — 解释 Infernux 的场景所有权、GameObject 身份、Transform 层级、组件查询、激活状态与按构建索引加载场景。 · status=preview; since=0.2.1; last_verified=2026-07-15
- [屏幕空间 UI](https://infernux-engine.com/wiki/site/zh/manual/ui.html) — 解释屏幕空间 UI 层级、Canvas 缩放、锚点、文本和图片布局、按钮事件、命中测试与当前过渡效果限制。 · status=preview; since=0.2.1; last_verified=2026-07-15

### Architecture

#### en
- [Why Infernux Exists](https://infernux-engine.com/wiki/site/en/architecture/about.html) — A non-technical project-origin essay explaining why Infernux chose a C++ core with a Python authoring layer and what the project is trying to become. · status=stable; since=0.1.0; last_verified=2026-07-15
- [Deep Dive: JIT-Accelerated Scripting in Infernux](https://infernux-engine.com/wiki/site/en/architecture/jit.html) — Explains how batch reads, ComponentDataStore, NumPy buffers, and Numba JIT reduce Python/native boundary overhead for data-parallel gameplay workloads. · status=experimental; since=0.2.1; last_verified=2026-07-15
- [Native–Python Boundary](https://infernux-engine.com/wiki/site/en/architecture/native-python-boundary.html) — Maps ownership across the C++ runtime, pybind11 module, Python public API, and PyComponentProxy lifecycle bridge, including the rules for identity, lifetime, and serialization. · status=preview; since=0.2.1; last_verified=2026-07-15
- [Render Graph Ownership](https://infernux-engine.com/wiki/site/en/architecture/render-graph-ownership.html) — Explains the rendering authority split: Python defines RenderGraph topology and RenderStack composition while C++ validates, compiles, allocates resources, inserts Vulkan barriers, and executes passes. · status=preview; since=0.2.1; last_verified=2026-07-15

#### zh-CN
- [为什么会有Infernux](https://infernux-engine.com/wiki/site/zh/architecture/about.html) — 一篇非技术性的项目缘起随笔，说明 Infernux 为什么采用 C++ 核心与 Python 创作层，以及项目希望走向哪里。 · status=stable; since=0.1.0; last_verified=2026-07-15
- [深入理解：Infernux 的 JIT 加速脚本系统](https://infernux-engine.com/wiki/site/zh/architecture/jit.html) — 解释批量读写、ComponentDataStore、NumPy 缓冲区与 Numba JIT 如何降低数据并行玩法逻辑的 Python/原生边界开销。 · status=experimental; since=0.2.1; last_verified=2026-07-15
- [原生层与 Python 的边界](https://infernux-engine.com/wiki/site/zh/architecture/native-python-boundary.html) — 梳理 C++ 运行时、pybind11 模块、Python 公共 API 与 PyComponentProxy 生命周期桥之间的职责，并说明对象身份、生命周期和序列化规则。 · status=preview; since=0.2.1; last_verified=2026-07-15
- [RenderGraph 的职责与所有权](https://infernux-engine.com/wiki/site/zh/architecture/render-graph-ownership.html) — 解释渲染权威的拆分：Python 定义 RenderGraph 拓扑与 RenderStack 组合，C++ 负责验证、编译、资源分配、Vulkan 屏障插入和执行。 · status=preview; since=0.2.1; last_verified=2026-07-15

## Guidance-linked API

Use [api-index.json](https://infernux-engine.com/api-index.json) for exhaustive symbol lookup and exact signatures. The links below are symbols with curated examples or explicit Learn/Manual/Architecture relationships.
- [Infernux.components.builtin.AudioListener](https://infernux-engine.com/wiki/site/en/api/AudioListener.html) / [中文](https://infernux-engine.com/wiki/site/zh/api/AudioListener.html) — kind=class; status=preview; example=curated; related_documents=1

## Community and support

- [Community hub](https://infernux-engine.com/community.html): anonymous public topic reading, GitHub-native sign-in/write paths, and an opt-in Giscus reply wall.
- [GitHub Discussions](https://github.com/ChenlizheMe/Infernux/discussions): questions, ideas, conversation, and showcases.
- [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/ChenlizheMe/Infernux/issues): reproducible defects and actionable engineering work.

## Declared discovery surfaces

- [llms](https://infernux-engine.com/llms.txt): this compact deterministic Agent discovery index.
- [llms_full](https://infernux-engine.com/llms-full.txt): complete bilingual curated bodies plus a compact localized API catalog.
- [curated_docs](https://infernux-engine.com/docs-index.json): curated document metadata, order, status, freshness, relationships, and canonical URLs.
- [learning_paths](https://infernux-engine.com/learning-paths.json): ordered onboarding steps, completion criteria, timing, and bilingual routes.
- [docs_health](https://infernux-engine.com/docs-health.json): coverage, maturity, example, relationship, freshness, and provenance telemetry.
- [api](https://infernux-engine.com/api-index.json): localized API symbols, kinds, signatures, examples, relationships, and canonical URLs.
- [api_changes](https://infernux-engine.com/api-changes.json): recorded release-to-release API additions, removals, and structural changes.
- [release](https://infernux-engine.com/release.json): current release identity, verification boundary, artifacts, sizes, digests, and URLs.
- [release_notes](https://infernux-engine.com/release-notes.json): structured release summary, comparison, change groups, and upgrade notes.
- [wiki_catalog](https://infernux-engine.com/assets/wiki-docs.json): searchable curated documentation catalog.
- [sitemap](https://infernux-engine.com/sitemap.xml): canonical public URL inventory.
- [community](https://infernux-engine.com/community.html): human-facing GitHub-backed community surface.

## Current evidence snapshot

- Documentation health: localized_pages=198; curated_documents=40; localized_api_symbols=158; relationship_edges=112.
- Release: v0.2.1; channel=technical-preview; published_at=2026-07-10T15:33:55Z; checksum=SHA-256; publisher_signature=not-declared; authority=GitHub Releases.
- Build provenance: status=stamped; source_commit=2e09cbbdcd13a828d3b6b9be15c5768b85e88384; generated_at=2026-07-16T23:42:21.000Z.

## Agent trust rules

1. Compare since and last_verified metadata with the installed engine version.
2. Use generated API pages as the authority for current signatures.
3. Use api-changes.json only for recorded release-to-release structural differences; absence of a prior snapshot means compatibility is unknown.
4. Use Learn and Manual pages as the authority for recommended workflows.
5. Do not treat experimental architecture directions as shipped features without corroboration.
6. Prefer an entry matching the user's language and installed engine version; do not silently substitute another version or a similarly named API from another engine.
7. Use this file for discovery only. Exact current signatures remain governed by api-index.json and generated API pages.
